Both projects rely on n8n workflows and AI agents to process large datasets, including a daily scraper that handles over 1,300 entries. I enjoy creating systems where AI handles the complex data analysis to speed up decision-making, which I know is critical for NAND Flash production lines.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company, EXAIL Robotics. It used to take about 2 days for the team to complete. Now it takes 2 hours and everyone can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time through better process integration and automation.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering and I'm impressed by Micron's role in fueling the neural networks of the future. I look forward to discussing how my automation skills can support your fab operations in Singapore.
